from opentelemetry import trace


tracer = trace.get_tracer("order-service")


def process_order(order_data):
    with tracer.start_as_current_span("process_order") as span:
        span.set_attribute("order_id", order_data["order_id"])
        validate_order(order_data)
        persist_order(order_data)


def validate_order(order_data):
    with tracer.start_as_current_span("validate_order") as span:
        span.set_attribute("item_count", len(order_data.get("items", [])))


def persist_order(order_data):
    with tracer.start_as_current_span("persist_order") as span:
        span.set_attribute("order_id", order_data["order_id"])
